products.name: ZenSpace Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: A tactile, wireless hot-swappable mechanical keyboard featuring elegant wooden housing and custom muted switches for a premium typing experience.

products.name: Minimalist Wool Desk Mat
products.description: Premium merino wool felt desk organizer mat to protect your workspace and add natural warmth and comfort to your daily routines.

products.name: Nordic Oak Headphone Stand
products.description: Solid steam-bent oak wood stand with a matte powder-coated steel base, designed to display and hold premium audiophile headphones.

products.name: Ergonomic Active Office Chair
products.description: Lumbar-supporting, breathable mesh mesh chair with full adjustable armrests and seat depth, built for long creative sessions.

products.name: Aura Glass Water Carafe
products.description: Hand-blown borosilicate glass carafe with a signature sphere cork lid, bringing minimal elegance to your desk hydration.

products.name: Muted Sage Water Bottle
products.description: Double-walled vacuum insulated stainless steel bottle in a matte sage green finish. Keeps your beverages cold for 24 hours.

products.name: Lunar Eclipse Desk Lamp
products.description: Sculptural dimmable LED lamp casting warm ambient light, inspired by lunar phases. Perfect for evening writing or wind-down routines.

products.name: Leather Desk Organizer Tray
products.description: Hand-stitched full-grain leather tray to keep your keys, pens, and coins organized in one elegant place.

products.name: Amber Glass Soy Candle
products.description: Hand-poured soy wax candle infused with notes of sandalwood, amber, and cedarwood in a minimalist glass jar.

products.name: Beechwood Analogue Desk Clock
products.description: Silent sweeping hand quartz clock carved from natural solid beechwood, adding organic style to your desktop.
